# Uxio

> AI-powered competitive landing page analyzer for SaaS. Submit any public URL — Uxio runs a 7-agent pipeline that identifies your 3 closest true competitors, scores 12 page sections on a 10-axis rubric (Communication, Conversion, Visual), and returns prioritized, evidence-backed recommendations in 2–4 minutes. No login required.

Uxio is built for SaaS founders, product designers, growth marketers, and PMs who need defensible, competitor-cited design critique — not generic UX advice. Every finding references specific copy or visual elements from real competitor pages. Results are delivered via real-time SSE stream and exportable as PDF.

## Docs

- [Full Technical Reference](https://uxio-wheat.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Complete pipeline details, 10-axis scoring rubric with anchor examples, quality gate, agent descriptions, competitor discovery methodology, and architecture

## Use

- [Live App](https://uxio-wheat.vercel.app/): Submit any public SaaS landing page URL — analysis runs immediately, no account needed

## Optional

- [7-Agent Pipeline](https://uxio-wheat.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Page Intelligence → Multi-Signal Discovery → Competitor Validator → Scraper → Section Classifier → Vision Analyzer → Synthesis
- [10-Axis Scoring Rubric](https://uxio-wheat.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Communication (1.5×): clarity, specificity, icpFit — Conversion (1.2×): attentionRatio, ctaQuality, trustSignals — Visual (1.0×): visualHierarchy, cognitiveEase, typographyReadability, densityBalance
- [Quality Gate](https://uxio-wheat.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): 5-signal validation (evidence grounding 30%, score variance 25%, specificity rate 20%, competitor presence 15%, field completeness 10%) before result delivery
